audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:als + subordinate clause]] and [[grammar:subject + finite verb + vaak/soms/nooit]]. Use [[grammar:als]] for when or whenever in a repeated situation. Use [[grammar:vaak]], [[grammar:soms]], or [[grammar:nooit]] after the finite verb to say how often something happens.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:als + subordinate clause]]: [[grammar:Als]] introduces subordinate verb-final order and leaves the main clause as the outcome.; [[grammar:subject + finite verb + vaak/soms/nooit]]: The frequency adverb occupies the middle field and scopes over the event.

audienceSections.normal:
#### als + subordinate clause

Use [[grammar:als]] for when or whenever in a repeated situation. Example: [[grammar:Als het regent, trainen we binnen.]]

#### subject + finite verb + vaak/soms/nooit

Use [[grammar:vaak]], [[grammar:soms]], or [[grammar:nooit]] after the finite verb to say how often something happens. Example: [[grammar:Ik train vaak op vrijdag.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### als + subordinate clause

[[grammar:Als]] introduces subordinate verb-final order and leaves the main clause as the outcome. Literal example: [[grammar:Als het regent, trainen we binnen.]]

#### subject + finite verb + vaak/soms/nooit

The frequency adverb occupies the middle field and scopes over the event. Literal example: [[grammar:Ik train vaak op vrijdag.]]

audienceSections.normal: [[grammar:Als]] can mean when or if. Frequency adverbs normally stand after the finite verb in these main clauses.
audienceSections.expert: [[grammar:Als]] can mean when or if. Frequency adverbs normally stand after the finite verb in these main clauses.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Wanneer heb jij training, Noor?]] — When do you have practice, Noor?
- [[grammar:Ik train vaak op vrijdag.]] — I often train on Friday.
- [[grammar:Ik oefen soms op woensdag in de tuin.]] — I sometimes practise on Wednesday in the garden.
- [[grammar:Als het regent, trainen we binnen.]] — When it rains, we practise indoors.
- [[grammar:Onze wedstrijd is meestal op zaterdag.]] — Our match is usually on Saturday.
- [[grammar:Ik speel nooit op zondag.]] — I never play on Sunday.
- [[grammar:Als ik huiswerk heb, oefen ik later.]] — When I have homework, I practise later.
- [[grammar:Zeg je soms een training af?]] — Do you sometimes cancel a training session?
- [[grammar:Alleen als ik ziek ben.]] — Only when I am ill.
- [[grammar:Als de wedstrijd vroeg begint, vertrek ik met de bus.]] — When the match starts early, I leave by bus.
- [[grammar:Ik fiets vaak, maar bij regen neem ik de tram.]] — I often cycle, but in rain I take the tram.
- [[grammar:Dan schrijven we het hele schema in de agenda.]] — Then we will write the whole schedule in the planner.
